title: Luggage Straps 3 Pack
features: Multipurpose straps for luggage and securing tents
description: The perfect travel companion, this pack of 3 luggage straps will support you on any journey that you make. Coming with 3 different lengths in every single pack, you'll be able to have exactly the right strap for the job. When you need more security for packing your luggage or securing tents, the strong yet elasticated straps are deliberately vibrant to help you spot your items straight away. Strong curved grip hooks are attached to both ends to avoid you having to physically tie the straps together every time you need to use them. Incredibly versatile and ready for every eventuality, this pack of 3 luggage straps is sure to become a staple when travelling.
